SELECT L.name FROM League AS L JOIN "Match" AS M ON L.id = M.league_id WHERE M.season = '2015/2016' AND M.home_team_goal IS NOT NULL AND M.away_team_goal IS NOT NULL GROUP BY L.id, L.name ORDER BY SUM(M.home_team_goal + M.away_team_goal) DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT CAST((strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', T1.birthday)) AS REAL) AS age FROM Player AS T1 JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id WHERE T2.sprint_speed >= 97 AND T2.date BETWEEN '2013-01-01' AND '2015-12-31'
SELECT T1.name, COUNT(T2.league_id) FROM League AS T1 JOIN "Match" AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.league_id GROUP BY T1.name ORDER BY COUNT(T2.league_id) DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT team_fifa_api_id FROM Team_Attributes WHERE buildUpPlaySpeed > 50 AND buildUpPlaySpeed < 60

SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.preferred_foot = 'left' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.player_fifa_api_id) FROM Player_Attributes AS T1 JOIN Player AS T2 ON T1.player_fifa_api_id = T2.player_fifa_api_id WHERE SUBSTR(T2.birthday, -4) BETWEEN '1987' AND '1992'

SELECT T1.url FROM seasons AS T1 JOIN races AS T2 ON T1.year = T2.year WHERE T2.raceId = 901

SELECT T1.nationality FROM drivers AS T1 JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.driverId = T2.driverId ORDER BY T2.fastestLapSpeed DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT (CAST(strftime('%Y','now') AS INTEGER) - CAST(strftime('%Y', dob) AS INTEGER)) AS age, (forename || ' ' || surname) AS name FROM drivers WHERE nationality = 'Japanese' AND dob IS NOT NULL ORDER BY dob DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT r.name, c.name, c.location FROM races AS r JOIN circuits AS c ON r.circuitId = c.circuitId WHERE strftime('%Y', r.date) = '2005' AND strftime('%m', r.date) = '09'

SELECT circuitRef FROM circuits WHERE name = 'Marina Bay Street Circuit'

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT c.client_id) FROM "client" AS c JOIN "district" AS d ON c.district_id = d.district_id JOIN "disp" AS disp ON c.client_id = disp.client_id WHERE c.gender = 'F' AND c.birth_date < '1950-01-01' AND d.A2 = 'Sokolov'

SELECT T4.A2 FROM client AS T1 JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id JOIN account AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id JOIN district AS T4 ON T3.district_id = T4.district_id WHERE T1.gender = 'F' AND T1.birth_date = '1976-01-29'

SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T2.gender = 'M' THEN 1 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(T2.client_id) * 100 AS percentage_male_clients FROM district AS T1 JOIN client AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id WHERE T1.A3 = 'south Bohemia' AND T1.A4 = (SELECT CAST(A4 AS REAL) FROM district WHERE A3 = 'south Bohemia' ORDER BY CAST(A4 AS REAL) DESC LIMIT 1)

WITH first_loan AS (
    SELECT account_id
    FROM loan
    WHERE date = '1993-07-05' AND status = 'A'
    ORDER BY date ASC
    LIMIT 1
), 
account_balance AS (
    SELECT 
        t1.account_id,
        t1.balance AS balance_1993_03_22,
        t2.balance AS balance_1998_12_27
    FROM trans t1
    JOIN trans t2 ON t1.account_id = t2.account_id
    JOIN first_loan fl ON t1.account_id = fl.account_id
    WHERE t1.date = '1993-03-22' AND t2.date = '1998-12-27'
)
SELECT 
    CAST((balance_1998_12_27 - balance_1993_03_22) AS REAL) / balance_1993_03_22 * 100 AS increase_rate
FROM account_balance
SELECT (CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'A' THEN amount ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / SUM(amount)) * 100 FROM loan

SELECT CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN T1.status = 'C' THEN T1.account_id END) AS REAL) / COUNT(DISTINCT T1.account_id) * 100 FROM loan AS T1 JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id WHERE T1.amount < 100000

SELECT DISTINCT d.district_id, ((CAST(d.A13 AS REAL) - CAST(d.A12 AS REAL)) / CAST(d.A12 AS REAL)) * 100 AS unemployment_increment FROM loan AS l JOIN account AS a ON l.account_id = a.account_id JOIN disp AS dp ON a.account_id = dp.account_id JOIN client AS c ON dp.client_id = c.client_id JOIN district AS d ON c.district_id = d.district_id WHERE l.status = 'D' AND d.A12 IS NOT NULL AND d.A13 IS NOT NULL

SELECT d.A2 AS district_name, COUNT(DISTINCT a.account_id) AS female_account_holders FROM district d JOIN account a ON d.district_id = a.district_id JOIN disp dp ON a.account_id = dp.account_id JOIN client c ON dp.client_id = c.client_id WHERE c.gender = 'F' GROUP BY d.A2 ORDER BY female_account_holders DESC LIMIT 9

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM loan AS T1 JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id WHERE T1.status = 'A' AND T1.amount >= 250000 AND T2.frequency = 'POPLATEK MESICNE' AND T1.date BETWEEN '1995-01-01' AND '1997-12-31'

SELECT T1.A2 AS district_name, T3.amount FROM district AS T1 JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id JOIN trans AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id WHERE T3.type = 'VYDAJ' AND T3.date LIKE '1996-01%' AND T3.operation != 'VKLAD KARTOU' ORDER BY T3.amount DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.account_id) FROM "account" AS T1 JOIN "loan" AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id JOIN "district" AS T3 ON T1.district_id = T3.district_id WHERE T2.status IN ('C', 'D') AND T3.A2 = '1'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM client AS c JOIN district AS d ON c.district_id = d.district_id JOIN (SELECT district_id FROM district WHERE A15 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY CAST(A15 AS REAL) DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1) AS t ON d.district_id = t.district_id WHERE c.gender = 'M'

SELECT DISTINCT T2.client_id FROM trans AS T1 JOIN account AS T3 ON T1.account_id = T3.account_id JOIN disp AS T2 ON T3.account_id = T2.account_id JOIN card AS T4 ON T2.disp_id = T4.disp_id WHERE T1.type = 'VYBER' AND T1.operation = 'VYBER KARTOU' AND T1.amount < (SELECT AVG(amount) FROM trans WHERE type = 'VYBER' AND operation = 'VYBER KARTOU') AND strftime('%Y', T1.date) = '1998'
SELECT DISTINCT T1.frequency FROM "account" AS T1 JOIN "district" AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id WHERE T1.frequency != 'OWNER' AND T2.A11 > 8000 AND T2.A11 <= 9000
SELECT AVG(A15) FROM district WHERE A15 > 4000 AND district_id IN (SELECT district_id FROM account WHERE date >= '1997-01-01')
SELECT T.* FROM "trans" AS T JOIN "disp" AS D ON T.account_id = D.account_id JOIN "client" AS C ON D.client_id = C.client_id WHERE C.client_id = 3356 AND T.operation = 'VYBER'

SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN gender = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(*) * 100 FROM (SELECT DISTINCT c.client_id, c.gender FROM client c JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id JOIN district dist ON a.district_id = dist.district_id WHERE dist.A11 > 10000) sub

WITH sums AS (SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', l.date) = '1996' THEN l.amount END) AS sum1996, SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', l.date) = '1997' THEN l.amount END) AS sum1997 FROM loan l JOIN account a ON l.account_id = a.account_id JOIN disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id JOIN client c ON d.client_id = c.client_id WHERE c.gender = 'M') SELECT ( (sums.sum1997 - sums.sum1996) * 100.0 / CAST(sums.sum1996 AS REAL) ) AS growth_rate FROM sums
SELECT (SELECT frequency FROM "account" WHERE account_id = 3) AS frequency, (SELECT k_symbol FROM "trans" WHERE amount = 3539 LIMIT 1) AS aim

SELECT CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN T1.gender = 'M' AND T2.frequency = 'POPLATEK TYDNE' THEN T1.client_id END) AS REAL) / COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN T2.frequency = 'POPLATEK TYDNE' THEN T1.client_id END) * 100 FROM "client" AS T1 JOIN "disp" AS T3 ON T1.client_id = T3.client_id JOIN "account" AS T2 ON T3.account_id = T2.account_id

SELECT T1.account_id FROM account AS T1 JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id JOIN client AS T3 ON T2.client_id = T3.client_id JOIN district AS T4 ON T3.district_id = T4.district_id WHERE T3.gender = 'F' AND T3.birth_date IS NOT NULL AND T4.A11 IS NOT NULL GROUP BY T1.account_id HAVING CAST(T3.birth_date AS TEXT) = (SELECT CAST(MIN(birth_date) AS TEXT) FROM client WHERE gender = 'F' AND birth_date IS NOT NULL) AND T4.A11 = (SELECT MIN(A11) FROM district WHERE A11 IS NOT NULL)
SELECT AVG(T1.amount) FROM loan AS T1 JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id WHERE T1.status IN ('C', 'D') AND T2.frequency = 'POPLATEK PO OBRATU'

SELECT T3.client_id, CAST(strftime('%Y', 'now') AS INTEGER) - CAST(strftime('%Y', T3.birth_date) AS INTEGER) AS age FROM card AS T1 JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.disp_id = T2.disp_id JOIN client AS T3 ON T2.client_id = T3.client_id WHERE T1.type = 'gold' AND T2.type = 'OWNER'
SELECT a.account_id, d.A2, d.A3 FROM account AS a JOIN district AS d ON a.district_id = d.district_id WHERE a.frequency = 'POPLATEK PO OBRATU' AND strftime('%Y', a.date) = '1993'

SELECT a.account_id, a.frequency FROM "account" AS a JOIN "disp" AS d ON a.account_id = d.account_id JOIN "client" AS c ON d.client_id = c.client_id JOIN "district" AS dist ON c.district_id = dist.district_id WHERE dist.A2 = 'east Bohemia' AND a.date BETWEEN '1995-01-01' AND '2000-12-31'
